<?php namespace Illuminate\Contracts\Pipeline; use Closure; interface Pipeline { /** * Set the object being sent through the pipeline. * * @param mixed $passable * @return $this */ public function send($passable); /** * Set the array of pipes. * * @param mixed $pipes * @return $this */ public function through($pipes); /** * Set the method to call on the pipes. * * @param string $method * @return $this */ public function via($method); /** * Run the pipeline with a final destination callback. * * @param \Closure $destination * @return mixed */ public function then(Closure $destination); }
